heading: Biennial survey of economic and housing market conditions
label: 1701z–10a Biennial survey of economic and housing market conditions
text: The Secretary shall, not less than biennially, survey national, regional, and local economic and housing market conditions in a manner that provides data comparable to the data collected in such survey conducted in 1981.
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Housing and Urban Development Act of 1970, and not as part of the National Housing Act which comprises this chapter.
